title: Aadi Krithigai
text: Celebrate Aadfi Krithigai with us on August 6th & 7th. Main Utsavam on Tursday, August 7th.

title: Aadi Bharani Nakshatra
text: Begins on Wednesday, August 5 at 9:18 PM and ends on Thursday, August 6 at 8:13 PM

title: Aadi Krithigai Nakshatr
text: Begins on Thursday, August 6 at 8:13 PM and ends on Friday, August 7 at 6:43 PM
Krittika Nakshatra<b> enters on the evening of Thursday, August 6th, it remains active through sunrise (Udaya Nakshatra) and prevails for almost the entire day of <b>Friday, August 7th.
